title: Login not working
description: Users are unable to log in using email and password.

title: App crashes on startup
description: App crashes immediately after launching on Android 14.

title: Profile image upload fails
description: Image upload fails with a 500 error on the profile screen.

title: Notifications not received
description: Push notifications are not delivered on iOS devices.

title: Dark mode issues
description: Some text is unreadable in dark mode on the settings page.
